title: Brilliant Void Realm
content:
Brilliant Void Realm
 is the only rank 9 cultivation planet in the 
Brilliant Void Star System
.

Background
[
]

In the past, they teamed up with the 
Cultivation Alliance
 to defeat the 
Four Divine Sect
. After many conspiracies, they were able to bring the Four Divine Sect to their weakest point.

In the middle of the war, the most powerful 
Azure Dragon Divine Emperor
 went missing and the news of the most feared 
Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
 entering his third 
Heaven’s Blight
 was leaked. This opened the Four Divine Sect for an unprecedented crisis. Nevertheless, the Four Divine Sect was still strong enough to fight against the Cultivation Alliance, and they didn’t fear the Brilliant Void Realm.

Brilliant Void Realm attacked in full-force, breaking its agreement of only indirectly participating. Still the Alliance and Brilliant Void were unable to completely annihilate the Four Divine as they dreaded their Four Divine Beast Treasures.

History
[
]

Mu Bingmei
 is current Saintess of the Brilliant Void Realm. 
Liu Mei
 was one of her nine avatars. She took 
Zhou Ru
 as her disciple most probably due to the latter's connection with 
Wang Lin
.

Mu Bingmei's junior disciple sister entered the 
East Demon Spirit Sea
 alongside Middle-Aged Woman and Master Void, an elder of the Cultivation Alliance and 
Master Zhongxuan
's younger brother.

It was destroyed by 
Tuo Sen
 after he escaped from the Land of the Ancient God. Its Saintess, Mu Bingmei, was seriously injured and forced to flee while its Ancestor, 
Lu Yundao
, was sealed into one of Tuo Sen's Ancient God stars.
